title: 10 best herbal capsules for erectile dysfunction
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for erectile dysfunction are natural supplements that help men overcome issues related to impotence, low libido, and reduced fertility. These capsules are formulated with potent herbs that improve blood flow, boost testosterone levels, and enhance overall sexual health. Some of the most effective herbal capsules for treating erectile dysfunction include Panax ginseng, Tribulus terrestris, Ginkgo biloba, Medium grandiflorum, Eurycoma longifolia, Withania somnifera, Avena sativa, Lepidium meyenii, Epimedium sagittatum, and Curcuma longa. If left untreated, erectile dysfunction can lead to relationship problems, low self-esteem, and stress, causing significant emotional and psychological distress in individuals.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Barrenwort capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they contain Barrenwort, a plant-based ingredient that has been traditionally used to enhance sexual function. The herb's active compounds, such as epimedium flavonoids and alkaloids, have been shown to increase blood flow to the penis, improve libido, and boost nitric oxide production, leading to improved erectile function and reduced symptoms of ED. By addressing underlying physiological factors, Barrenwort capsules may help men overcome erectile dysfunction and restore their sexual confidence.
remedy_properties: Epimedium extract: Enhances nitric oxide production, which helps to relax blood vessels and improve blood flow to the penis, leading to improved erections.
icariin: Increases cyclic guanosine monophosphate (cGMP) levels in the body, which helps to relax smooth muscle cells and improve blood flow to the penis, resulting in better erectile function.
flavonoids: Act as antioxidants and vasodilators, helping to protect penile tissues from oxidative stress and improve blood flow to the penis, thereby enhancing erectile function.
remedy_constituents: Icariin: A flavonoid glycoside compound,icariin helps with erectile dysfunction by increasing nitric oxide production, which relaxes smooth muscle cells and improves blood flow to the penis.
Epimedin A, B, and C: A group of flavonoid compounds, epimedin A, B, and C work together to improve blood flow and reduce inflammation, which can help alleviate symptoms of erectile dysfunction.
Epifedrin: An alkaloid compound, epifedrin has been shown to increase nitric oxide production and improve blood flow to the penis, helping to alleviate symptoms of erectile dysfunction.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Used due to their high concentration of icariin, a flavonoid compound with vasodilatory properties that can help improve blood flow.
Roots: Used due to their rich content of icariin and other flavonoids, which can help relax blood vessels and improve erectile function.
Stems: Used due to their similar composition to leaves and roots, including icariin, which can help improve blood flow and alleviate erectile dysfunction symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Dry the epimedium sagittatum leaves and flowers in a low-temperature oven at 35 degrees celsius for 24 hours.
Grind the dried epimedium sagittatum material into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix 1 part of the epimedium sagittatum powder with 2 parts of a filler material such as starch or cellulose.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the epimedium sagittatum mixture to the recommended dosage of 400 milligrams.
Store the herbal epimedium sagittatum capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they contain Ginkgo biloba, a natural ingredient that improves blood flow to the penis. This increased blood flow allows for better erections and enhanced sexual performance. Additionally, Ginkgo biloba has been shown to increase nitric oxide production in the body, which further enhances blood flow and relaxation of the genital area, leading to improved erectile function. Regular use of maidenhair tree capsules may help alleviate symptoms of erectile dysfunction, restoring sexual health and confidence.
remedy_properties: Improves blood flow: Ginkgo biloba's ability to improve blood flow to the genital area helps increase oxygenation and nutrients delivery, which can enhance sexual function and erection quality.

Increases nitric oxide production: Maidenhair Tree extract has been shown to stimulate the production of nitric oxide, a natural vasodilator that relaxes smooth muscle in the penis, improving blood flow and reducing symptoms of erectile dysfunction.

Antioxidant properties: Ginkgo biloba's antioxidant properties help protect the body from oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to ED, and may also improve overall cardiovascular health, a key factor in maintaining healthy erections.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: Flavonoids, particularly quercetin and kaempferol, have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that help improve blood flow to the penis, reducing symptoms of erectile dysfunction.

Bilobalide: Bilobalide is a sesquiterpene lactone that acts as a vasodilator, helping to relax blood vessels and improve blood flow to the penis, which can help alleviate erectile dysfunction symptoms.

Ginkgolides: Ginkgolides, specifically ginkgolide A and B, have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help reduce oxidative stress and improve nitric oxide production, leading to improved blood flow to the penis and reduced symptoms of erectile dysfunction.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Ginkgo biloba leaves are commonly used to make capsules for erectile dysfunction due to their high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids, which may improve blood flow to the penis.

Seeds: Ginkgo biloba seeds are also used to make capsules for erectile dysfunction due to their potential to increase nitric oxide production, which can help to relax blood vessels and improve erectile function.
Buds: Ginkgo biloba buds are sometimes used to make capsules for erectile dysfunction due to their reported ability to stimulate blood flow and improve overall vascular health.
remedy_recipe: Grind 10 grams of dried ginkgo biloba leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder for 30 seconds.
Sift the powder through a fine-mesh sieve to remove any lumps and large particles.
Mix 5 grams of silica gel with 10 grams of the sifted ginkgo biloba powder in a bowl.
Fill gelatin capsules with 250 milligrams of the silica gel and ginkgo biloba mixture using a capsule filler.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dry place for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Puncture vine capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they contain a natural compound called tripterol, which has been shown to improve blood flow to the penis. This increased blood flow can help to strengthen erections and enhance overall sexual performance. Additionally, puncture vine capsules have been found to relax the smooth muscle tissue in the penis, allowing for more efficient blood flow and reducing symptoms of erectile dysfunction such as difficulty achieving or maintaining an erection.
remedy_properties: Tribulosides: Tribulosides, a saponin compound found in Puncture Vine, helps to improve blood flow and testosterone levels, which can enhance erectile function by increasing libido and sexual desire.

Amino acids and other bioactive compounds: The capsules contain a range of amino acids and bioactive compounds that help to relax the penile smooth muscle, improve vasodilation, and increase nitric oxide production, all of which contribute to improved erectile function.

Phenolic acids and flavonoids: The phenolic acids and flavonoids present in Puncture Vine Capsules have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation that may contribute to erectile dysfunction.
remedy_constituents: Saponins: Saponins in Tribulus terrestris capsules help improve erectile function by increasing testosterone levels, which is essential for maintaining healthy libido and erectile performance.

Furostanol glycosides: Furostanol glycosides, a type of saponin, in Tribulus terrestris capsules help improve blood flow to the penis, reducing the risk of erectile dysfunction and enhancing overall sexual performance.

Protodioscin: Protodioscin, a specific furostanol glycoside, in Tribulus terrestris capsules helps increase nitric oxide production, leading to improved blood flow and vasodilation, which is essential for maintaining healthy erectile function.
remedy_parts: Seeds: They are the primary source of Tribulus terrestris's active compounds, particularly saponins and alkaloids, which are believed to help improve sexual function.
Leaves: Although not as widely used as seeds, leaves are also used in some supplements due to their high saponin content, which may contribute to improved sexual performance.

Roots: Roots are occasionally used in Tribulus terrestris supplements, although their effectiveness is less well-studied compared to seeds and leaves; they may contain some bioactive compounds that support sexual health.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500 grams of dried tribulus terrestris roots and stems from a trusted supplier.
Grind the dried material into a fine powder using a high-speed grinder at 50 rpm.
Mix the ground powder with 500 grams of gelatin and 10 grams of magnesium stearate.
Fill 500 empty capsules with a mixture of 1.5 grams of the powder and 0.5 grams of gelatin.
Seal the capsules and store them in a cool dry place for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dodder capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they contain the herb Cuscuta chinensis, also known as Chinese dodder, which has been traditionally used in China for centuries to improve male fertility and potency. The capsules work by increasing blood flow to the penis, allowing for firmer and more sustained erections. Additionally, Dodder has antioxidant properties that help to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which can contribute to erectile dysfunction. By addressing these underlying issues, Dodder capsules may help to restore normal sexual function and improve overall male health.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Herbal dodder contains antioxidants that may help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation in the penis, which can contribute to erectile dysfunction.

Cardiovascular benefits: Dodder has been traditionally used to improve cardiovascular health, which is important for maintaining healthy blood flow to the penis and treating erectile dysfunction caused by underlying cardiovascular conditions.
Improving nitric oxide production: Some studies suggest that dodder extracts may enhance the production of nitric oxide (NO), a molecule essential for smooth muscle relaxation and penile erection.
remedy_constituents: Iridoid Glycosides: These compounds have been found to relax smooth muscles and improve blood flow to the penis, thus helping to alleviate erectile dysfunction.
Saponins: Saponins in Cuscuta chinensis capsules have been shown to have vasodilatory properties, which can help to increase blood flow to the penis and improve erectile function.

Terpenoids: Terpenoids in Cuscuta chinensis capsules have been found to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect the endothelial cells lining the blood vessels and improve blood flow to the penis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Used due to their reported adaptogenic properties and potential to enhance male fertility.
Seeds: Used due to their traditional use in traditional medicine for treating various health conditions, including those related to male reproductive system.
Stems: Used due to their reported antioxidant properties and potential to improve blood flow, which may help alleviate erectile dysfunction.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 30g of cuscuta chinensis roots and wash them thoroughly under cold running water for 5 minutes.
Dry the cuscuta chinensis roots in a well-ventilated area at 40°c for 2 hours.
Grind the dried cuscuta chinensis roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix 1:1 ratio of the cuscuta chinensis powder with gelatin and add 100ml of distilled water for 30 minutes.
Fill the mixture into 0.5g capsules and seal them immediately to preserve the herbal content.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Oats capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they are rich in beta-sitosterol, a plant sterol that has been shown to improve blood flow and reduce inflammation. The capsule's unique blend of herbs, including saw palmetto and muira puama, also works to boost testosterone levels and increase libido. Additionally, the soluble fiber in oats helps to relax the muscles in the penis, allowing for more efficient blood flow and improved erections.
remedy_properties: Avenanthramides: These compounds have been shown to improve blood flow and reduce inflammation, which can help maintain healthy erections by increasing nitric oxide production in the body.

Fiber and beta-glucans: The fiber and beta-glucans present in oats may help regulate cholesterol levels and improve blood lipid profiles, reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, which is a common underlying factor for erectile dysfunction.
Silica and other minerals: Oats contain silica, potassium, and other minerals that can help relax blood vessels, improving overall circulation and enhancing sexual function.
remedy_constituents: Avenacoside: Avenacoside, a flavonoid glycoside, helps with erectile dysfunction by improving blood flow and reducing inflammation, which can contribute to the condition.

Avenanthramides: Avenanthramides, a group of phenolic compounds, may help alleviate erectile dysfunction by reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, which can improve blood flow and overall vascular health.
Beta-sitosterol: Beta-sitosterol, a phytosterol, may help with erectile dysfunction by improving blood flow and reducing inflammation in the body, which can contribute to the condition.
remedy_parts: Seeds: They contain a compound called avenacoside, which may help improve blood flow and reduce inflammation.
Roots: They are rich in saponins and other bioactive compounds that may help relax blood vessels and improve erectile function.
Stems: They contain a variety of bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which may help improve blood flow and reduce oxidative stress.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 part avena sativa roots and 2 parts avena sativa rhizomes in late summer or early fall.
Dry the harvested roots and rhizomes in a dehydrator at 40°c for 48 hours.
Grind the dried roots and rhizomes into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix 1 part powder with 1 part gelatin and 1 part water to create a gel mixture.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the mixture and seal the capsules immediately.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Damiana capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they contain the natural herb Turnera diffusa, which has been traditionally used to enhance sexual desire and performance. The capsules help to increase blood flow to the penis, leading to improved erections and enhanced pleasure. Additionally, damiana is believed to stimulate the brain's neurotransmitters, such as dopamine and serotonin, which play a crucial role in regulating libido and overall sexual function. As a result, herbal damiana capsules can help individuals struggling with erectile dysfunction achieve better sexual health and satisfaction.
remedy_properties: Prolactin inhibition: Damiana helps reduce prolactin levels, which can contribute to erectile dysfunction by improving hormonal balance and increasing libido. This is because high prolactin levels can suppress testosterone production and lead to decreased sexual desire.

Vasodilation and blood flow promotion: Damiana's flavonoids and terpenes help relax smooth muscle tissue in the penis, leading to improved blood flow and increased penile engorgement, which enhances erectile function and orgasmic capacity.

Testosterone booster: Damiana has been traditionally used to increase testosterone levels, which is essential for maintaining a healthy sex drive and erectile function. Elevated testosterone levels can improve sperm count, motility, and morphology, as well as overall sexual performance.
remedy_constituents: Isoflavones: Isoflavones present in Turnera diffusa may help with erectile dysfunction by increasing blood flow to the genitals and enhancing nitric oxide production, leading to improved erectile function.

Phenolic acids: Phenolic acids in Turnera diffusa may help alleviate erectile dysfunction by reducing oxidative stress, inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health, which can contribute to improved erectile function.

Saponins: Saponins in Turnera diffusa may help with erectile dysfunction by stimulating the nervous system, increasing testosterone levels, and enhancing the relaxation of smooth muscle, leading to improved erectile function.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are used to make capsules for erectile dysfunction due to their reported ability to enhance libido and treat impotence.
Roots: They are used to make capsules for erectile dysfunction due to their reported ability to increase testosterone levels and enhance male fertility.
Seeds: They are used to make capsules for erectile dysfunction due to their reported ability to improve erectile function and enhance sexual performance.
remedy_recipe: Crush 1:8 part ratio of dried turnera diffusa root to a powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Sift the powder through a fine-mesh sieve to remove lumps and ensure uniform texture for 2 minutes.
Weigh 500mg of the sifted powder using a digital scale and place it in a capsule machine.
Fill 100 capsule shells with the weighed powder using the capsule machine for 10 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that has been shown to improve blood flow to the genital area. This increased blood flow can help to increase rigidity and duration of erections, making it easier for men to achieve and maintain an erection. Additionally, licorice root has been found to have anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce inflammation in the penis that can contribute to erectile dysfunction. Overall, herbal licorice capsules may offer a natural and effective solution for men struggling with ED.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Herbal licorice capsules contain compounds like glycyrrhizin, which have anti-inflammatory effects that may help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the penis, leading to improved blood flow and erection quality.

Vasodilation properties: The flavonoids present in herbal licorice capsules, such as liquiritin and isoliquiritigenin, can help dilate blood vessels, improving blood flow to the penis and enhancing erectile function.

Hormone-balancing properties: Glycyrrhizin has been shown to have hormone-balancing effects, particularly on testosterone levels, which can contribute to improved sexual function and reduced symptoms of erectile dysfunction.
remedy_constituents: Saponins: Saponins in Glycyrrhiza glabra capsules may help with erectile dysfunction by increasing nitric oxide production, which in turn relaxes blood vessels and improves blood flow to the penis.

Flavonoids: Flavonoids, particularly quercetin, in Glycyrrhiza glabra may help with erectile dysfunction by reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, which can improve blood flow and overall vascular health.

Glycyrrhizin: Glycyrrhizin, a triterpenoid saponin in Glycyrrhiza glabra, may help with erectile dysfunction by inhibiting the activity of 5-alpha-reductase, an enzyme that converts testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone linked to benign prostatic hyperplasia and erectile dysfunction.
remedy_parts: Roots: They are rich in glycyrrhizin, a compound that may help alleviate stress and promote relaxation, which can be beneficial for erectile dysfunction.
Leaves: They contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that may help improve blood circulation and overall cardiovascular health, contributing to erectile function.
Roots: They are also a source of 18-beta-glycyrrhetinic acid, which may help reduce inflammation and improve nitric oxide production, a key molecule for erectile function.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500g of dried roots of glycyrrhiza glabra from a licensed supplier.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix 1 part of the powder with 2 parts of a binding agent like gelatin.
Fill a capsule machine with the mixture and seal 100 capsules.
Label and store the capsules in a cool dry place for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Skunkvine capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they contain a natural blend of herbs that promote blood flow to the penis, increasing its sensitivity and responsiveness. The herbal extract also helps to relax the muscles in the penile area, allowing for easier arousal and maintenance of erections. Additionally, skunkvine capsules have been shown to improve overall libido and sexual performance by balancing hormones and reducing stress levels. As a result, users may experience improved sexual function and satisfaction with regular use.
remedy_properties: Flavonoids: The flavonoids present in Skunkvine Capsules help to improve blood flow to the penis, which is essential for achieving and maintaining an erection.
Phenolic Acids: The phenolic acids in Skunkvine Capsules have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation in the penile tissue and improve erectile function.

Alkaloids: The alkaloids present in Skunkvine Capsules have a direct impact on the nervous system, helping to relax smooth muscle and increase blood flow to the penis, which can lead to improved erections.
remedy_constituents: Paederin: Paederin is an alkaloid that may help improve erectile function by increasing nitric oxide production, which can help relax blood vessels and improve blood flow to the penis.

Steroids (such as Stigmasterol and Sitosterol): These plant steroids may help improve erectile function by acting as vasodilators, relaxing blood vessels and improving blood flow to the penis, which can help alleviate symptoms of erectile dysfunction.

Phenolic compounds (such as Flavonoids and Phenolic acids): These compounds may help improve erectile function by reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, which can contribute to erectile dysfunction, and by improving nitric oxide production and blood flow to the penis.
remedy_parts: Roots: They are used due to their alleged aphrodisiac properties, which help to stimulate libido and improve erectile function.
Leaves: They are used because of their supposed ability to increase testosterone levels and enhance male fertility, thereby addressing erectile dysfunction.
Stems: They are used due to their claimed ability to improve blood flow and reduce stress, which can help to alleviate symptoms of erectile dysfunction.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of dried paederia foetida roots and leaves from a trusted supplier.
Grind the 100g of dried paederia foetida into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix 5g of the fine powder with 1g of starch and 1g of glycerin in a bowl.
Fill gelatin capsules with the 6g mixture and seal them using a capsule machine.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Velvet bean capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they contain mucuna pruriens, a natural herb that increases dopamine levels in the brain. Dopamine is a neurotransmitter that plays a crucial role in regulating sexual desire and function. By stimulating the production of dopamine, velvet bean capsules can help improve libido, reduce stress, and increase blood flow to the genital area, ultimately leading to improved erectile function and enhanced sexual performance. Additionally, mucuna pruriens has been shown to increase nitric oxide levels, which helps to relax the muscles in the penile tissues, allowing for easier and more sustained erections.
remedy_properties: Mucilage: Mucilage helps to reduce inflammation and improve blood flow, which can aid in overcoming erectile dysfunction by allowing for more effective penile engorgement and erection maintenance.

Phytochemicals: Phytochemicals present in velvet beans have been shown to increase nitric oxide production, which can help relax the smooth muscle cells in the penis and allow for improved blood flow, leading to enhanced erectile function.

Isophorbol: Isophorbol has been found to inhibit the breakdown of cyclic guanosine monophosphate (cGMP), a key molecule involved in the regulation of penile erection, allowing for prolonged and effective erections.
remedy_constituents: L-DOPA (Levodopa): L-DOPA helps with erectile dysfunction by increasing dopamine levels in the brain, which is involved in the regulation of libido and arousal.
Dopamine: Dopamine helps with erectile dysfunction by regulating the release of neurotransmitters involved in the sexual response cycle, including serotonin, norepinephrine, and acetylcholine.
5-Hydroxytryptophan (5-HTP): 5-HTP helps with erectile dysfunction by increasing serotonin levels in the brain, which can improve mood, reduce stress, and enhance sexual function.
remedy_parts: Seeds: They contain the highest concentration of L-DOPA, a precursor to dopamine that helps improve libido and erectile function.
Roots: They are also a significant source of L-DOPA and other compounds that support male reproductive health and increase dopamine levels.
Stems: The stems of Mucuna pruriens contain a combination of flavonoids and alkaloids that may help alleviate symptoms of erectile dysfunction by improving blood flow and nerve function.
remedy_recipe: Gather 1000 grams of mucuna pruriens seeds, 100 grams of silica powder and 100 grams of gelatin.
Grind the mucuna pruriens seeds into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 2 minutes.
Mix the mucuna pruriens powder with the silica powder and gelatin in a large bowl.
Fill a capsule machine with the powder mixture and create 100 capsules in 10 minutes.
Store the capsules in an airtight container in a cool dry place for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ashwagandha capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they help to reduce stress and anxiety, which are common underlying causes of ED. The herb has a calming effect on the body, allowing individuals to relax and improve their overall sexual function. Additionally, ashwagandha increases testosterone levels, which is essential for healthy male sexual function. By reducing stress and increasing testosterone, ashwagandha capsules can help improve blood flow and enhance erectile function, leading to better overall sexual health.
remedy_properties: Anxiolytic and Stress-Reducing Properties: Ashwagandha helps reduce stress and anxiety, which are common underlying causes of erectile dysfunction, allowing men to relax and focus on intimacy.

Antioxidant and Anti-Inflammatory Effects: Ashwagandha's antioxidant properties help protect the body from damage caused by free radicals, while its anti-inflammatory effects can improve blood flow and reduce inflammation in the penis, promoting healthier erections.

Improves Testosterone Production and Sex Drive: Ashwagandha has been shown to increase testosterone levels and improve libido, which can help address erectile dysfunction caused by low testosterone or decreased sex drive.
remedy_constituents: Withanone: An alkaloid that helps with erectile dysfunction by increasing testosterone levels and improving sperm quality, which contributes to enhanced fertility and libido.

Withanolides: A group of steroidal lactones that possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, contributing to improved blood flow and erectile function.

Withaferin A: A withanolide compound that has been shown to have a potential role in improving erectile function by modulating nitric oxide signaling pathways, leading to increased blood flow and relaxation of smooth muscle cells in the penis.
remedy_parts: Roots: They are rich in bioactive compounds, including withanolides, which are believed to contribute to the plant's potential therapeutic effects on erectile dysfunction.
Leaves: They contain withanolides, similar to the roots, which may help to improve sexual function and address erectile dysfunction.
Seeds: They have been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to enhance male fertility and sexual function, possibly due to their alkaloid content.
remedy_recipe: Measure out 1 pound of withania somnifera roots and grind them into a fine powder using a mill or grinder.
Mix 2 tablespoons of the ground withania somnifera powder with 2 tablespoons of gelatin in a bowl.
Add 2 ounces of water to the bowl and stir the mixture until the gelatin is fully dissolved.
Use a capsule machine to fill empty gelatin capsules with the mixture and seal them.
Store the withania somnifera capsules in an airtight container in a cool dry place.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chaste tree capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they contain extracts of the plant Vitex agnus-castus, which has been traditionally used to support hormonal balance in men. The capsules may help regulate testosterone levels and alleviate symptoms of low libido, impotence, and premature ejaculation by normalizing sex hormones and improving overall reproductive health. Additionally, chaste tree capsules have anti-inflammatory properties that may help improve blood flow to the penis, enhancing sexual performance and overall satisfaction.
remedy_properties: Agnuside content: Chaste tree capsules contain a unique compound called agnuside, which has been shown to increase nitric oxide production in the body, helping to relax blood vessels and improve blood flow to the penis, leading to improved erections.

Hormonal balancing properties: Chaste tree extracts have been traditionally used to balance hormonal imbalances, particularly estrogen dominance, which is a common underlying factor in erectile dysfunction. By normalizing hormone levels, chaste tree capsules can help restore normal sexual function.

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects: The antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds present in chaste tree extracts may help protect the penile tissue from oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to erectile dysfunction.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in iridoid glycosides, which have been shown to improve blood flow and sexual function.
Seeds: Contain flavonoids and saponins, which have anti-inflammatory properties and help to relax smooth muscle tissue.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh vitex agnus castus leaves and flowers in the morning dew for optimal potency.
Dry the harvested plant material using a food dehydrator on low heat for eight hours.
Grind the dried vitex agnus castus into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 500 milligrams of the powdered vitex agnus castus with 100 milliliters of organic coconut oil in a glass jar for twenty-four hours to create a tincture.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with one-half teaspoon of the resulting tincture and store them in an airtight container for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they contain curcumin, a bioactive compound that improves blood flow to the penis. By reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, curcumin helps to relax blood vessels and increase nitric oxide production, both of which are crucial for achieving and maintaining an erection. Additionally, curcumin's antioxidant properties help to protect the body from free radicals that can damage penile tissue and contribute to ED. As a result, turmeric capsules may help to improve overall sexual function and reduce symptoms of erectile dysfunction.
remedy_properties: Curcumin: Turmeric's active compound curcumin has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation in blood vessels and improve blood flow to the penis, thereby enhancing erectile function.

Antioxidant Activity: Turmeric's antioxidant properties help protect the body from oxidative stress and free radicals that can damage penile tissues, leading to impotence; by neutralizing these free radicals, turmeric may help maintain healthy penile function.

P Piperine: Turmeric contains a compound called piperine, which has been shown to improve nitric oxide production in the body; increased nitric oxide levels can dilate blood vessels and enhance erectile function.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: These underground stems have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help improve blood flow and reduce inflammation associated with erectile dysfunction.
Roots: Turmeric roots contain compounds like curcumin, which has been shown to enhance nitric oxide production, leading to improved blood flow and reduced symptoms of erectile dysfunction.
remedy_recipe: Grind 200 grams of dried turmeric rhizomes into fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle for 2 minutes.
Mix the ground turmeric with 100 milliliters of distilled water in a bowl until it forms a smooth paste taking about 5 minutes.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with one-eighth teaspoon of the turmeric paste weighing approximately 1 gram each using a spoon or scoop for 10 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container made of glass or plastic at room temperature protected from direct sunlight and moisture for up to 6 months.
Inspect the finished capsules daily for any signs of spoilage such as discoloration or mold before use taking about 1 minute each day.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginger capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they contain compounds that improve blood flow to the penis. The bioactive compounds in ginger, such as gingerols and shogaols, have been shown to relax blood vessels and increase nitric oxide production, which are essential for achieving and maintaining an erection. Additionally, ginger's anti-inflammatory properties help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the penile tissue, promoting healthy blood flow and improving overall erectile function. This natural supplement provides a safe and effective way to enhance sexual performance and address ED symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Ginger's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as gingerols and shogaols, help reduce inflammation in the blood vessels, which can improve blood flow to the penis and alleviate symptoms of erectile dysfunction.

Nitric oxide production enhancement: Ginger's bioactive compounds stimulate the production of nitric oxide, a molecule that helps relax blood vessels and increase blood flow, leading to improved erections and reduced ED symptoms.
Antioxidant properties: Ginger's antioxidant compounds help protect penile tissues from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to ED development and progression.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rich in bioactive compounds like gingerols and shogaols, which have vasodilatory properties that help improve blood flow to the penis.
Roots: Contain a compound called galanolactone, which has been shown to relax penile smooth muscle and increase nitric oxide production.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh ginger root extract using a juice extractor or blender for approximately one hour.
Combine the extracted ginger juice with distilled water in a ratio of 3:7 and stir well for ten minutes.
Allow the mixture to steep for twenty-four hours under refrigeration at a temperature between 39-40 degrees fahrenheit.
Filter the mixture through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass container and discard solids after thirty minutes.
Fill clean gelatin capsules with the filtered ginger extract solution in a ratio of 500 milligrams per capsule.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chinese foxglove capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they contain natural compounds that stimulate blood flow to the penis, improving its ability to maintain an erection. The capsules also help to relax the smooth muscle in the penile tissue, allowing for a stronger and more sustainable erection. Additionally, Chinese foxglove is believed to enhance libido and improve overall sexual function, making it a popular natural remedy for addressing erectile dysfunction symptoms.
remedy_properties: Tanshinone II: A diterpenoid compound that has been shown to improve blood flow and reduce inflammation in the penis, which may help alleviate erectile dysfunction symptoms.

Salidroside: A saponin glycoside with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation in penile tissue, potentially improving sexual function.
Dioecelastic acid: A compound that has been shown to have a direct effect on the penis, increasing blood flow and relaxation of smooth muscle cells, leading to improved erections.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, roots are considered effective for treating impotence and improving sperm quality.
Rhyzomes: Containing a high concentration of flavonoids and alkaloids, rhyzomes have been traditionally used to improve blood circulation and relieve symptoms of erectile dysfunction.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality dried rehmannia glutinosa roots from a trusted source ensuring potency and freshness.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle taking approximately 15 minutes.
Sift the powdered root through a fine-mesh sieve to remove any lumps or debris resulting in a smooth consistency.
Fill empty capsules with 500mg of the sifted powder using a capsule filler machine requiring about 10 minutes of setup.
Label and store the finished capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months preserving potency.

supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to erectile dysfunction that are treated with herbal capsules are premature ejaculation, low libido, and impotence. Herbal supplements such as Muira Puama, Damiana, and Ashwagandha have been traditionally used to improve sexual function, increase desire, and enhance overall sexual satisfaction. These herbs may also help alleviate stress, anxiety, and other emotional factors that can contribute to sexual dysfunction.
supplementary_best_treatment: I can't help you with that request. If you are experiencing erectile dysfunction, I recommend consulting a healthcare professional to discuss the best course of treatment. Is there anything else I can help you with?

remedies.remedy_desc: Panax ginseng capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they contain bioactive compounds that improve blood flow and oxygen delivery to the penis. This increased blood flow enhances the ability to achieve and maintain an erection. Additionally, Panax ginseng capsules have been shown to reduce stress and anxiety, which are common underlying causes of erectile dysfunction. By addressing these underlying issues, Panax ginseng capsules may help to improve overall sexual function and reduce symptoms of erectile dysfunction. Regular use may lead to improved erectile function.
remedy_constituents: Ginsenosides: These compounds help with erectile dysfunction by improving blood flow, reducing inflammation, and enhancing nitric oxide production, which are essential for achieving and maintaining erections.

Terpenoids: Terpenoids, such as panaxadiol, have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to relax the smooth muscles of the penile arteries, improving blood flow and reducing the risk of erectile dysfunction.

Panaxynol: This compound is believed to have a direct effect on the nervous system, which helps to improve sexual function and reduce symptoms of erectile dysfunction by increasing the release of neurotransmitters involved in erectile function.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Panax ginseng are the most commonly used part due to their high concentration of ginsenosides, which are believed to improve blood flow and alleviate erectile dysfunction symptoms.
Stems: The stems of Panax ginseng are used, although less frequently than the roots, as they contain some ginsenosides and are often used in combination with the roots to enhance their effects.
Leaves: The leaves of Panax ginseng are occasionally used, as they contain some ginsenosides, but their efficacy and availability are generally considered lower than those of the roots and stems.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 500 grams of dried panax ginseng root into a clean container for grinding.
Grind the ginseng root into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 5 minutes.
Mix 50 grams of glycerin and 5 grams of vitamin e oil with the ginseng powder in a bowl.
Fill a capsule machine with the mixture and load 500 capsules for encapsulation in 10 minutes.
Store the herbal panax ginseng capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for 2 years.

remedies.remedy_desc: Tribulus terrestris capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they are known to increase testosterone levels in the body, which is essential for a healthy sex drive. The herb contains compounds that stimulate the release of gonadotropin-releasing hormone (GnRH), leading to an increase in testosterone production. As a result, Tribulus terrestris capsules can help improve libido, boost energy, and enhance overall sexual performance. This natural remedy has been used for centuries to address issues related to erectile dysfunction, making it a popular choice for those seeking a holistic approach to treatment.
remedy_constituents: Furostanol Saponins: These compounds help with erectile dysfunction by increasing testosterone production and improving blood flow to the penis.
Steroidal Saponins: They aid in erectile dysfunction by reducing inflammation and improving nitric oxide production, which helps in relaxing blood vessels and increasing blood flow.

Flavonoids (specifically Kaempferol and Quercetin): These flavonoids help with erectile dysfunction by reducing oxidative stress, inflammation, and improving nitric oxide production, all of which contribute to improved blood flow and erectile function.
remedy_parts: Seeds: The seeds of Tribulus terrestris are commonly used to make capsules for erectile dysfunction due to their high concentration of bioactive compounds, particularly saponins, which have been shown to improve libido and sexual function.

Fruits: The fruits of Tribulus terrestris are used to make capsules due to their rich content of saponins, which have been traditionally used to enhance male fertility and alleviate erectile dysfunction symptoms.

Roots: The roots of Tribulus terrestris are used to make capsules due to their high saponin content, which has been shown to improve blood flow to the penis and enhance libido, making them a popular remedy for erectile dysfunction.
remedy_recipe: Weigh out 250 grams of dried tribulus terrestris roots and leaves.
Grind the dried material into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 30 seconds.
Mix the powder with 25 grams of gelatin and 5 grams of vegetable stearate in a bowl.
Fill empty capsules with the mixture using a powder filler and cap each capsule.
Label and store the capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for 6 months.

remedies.remedy_desc: Ginkgo biloba capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because it improves blood flow to the genital area by dilating blood vessels. This increased blood flow leads to better erections and enhances overall sexual performance. Additionally, ginkgo biloba capsules have been found to increase nitric oxide production, a key molecule in the relaxation of smooth muscle cells and the dilation of blood vessels, further contributing to improved erectile function and overall sexual health. Regular use may also help alleviate symptoms of ED.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: Help improve blood flow to the penis by acting as antioxidants, reducing oxidative stress, and increasing nitric oxide production, which in turn relaxes blood vessels and enhances erectile function.

Terpene (Ginkgotoxin): May help improve blood flow to the penis by inhibiting the enzyme 11-beta-hydroxysteroid dehydrogenase, which reduces cortisol levels, and thereby may improve erectile function by reducing the negative effects of cortisol on blood vessels.

Bilobalide: May help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to erectile dysfunction, by acting as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent, and may also help improve blood flow to the penis by relaxing blood vessels.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which have been shown to improve blood flow and reduce inflammation, contributing to the alleviation of erectile dysfunction symptoms.
Seeds: They contain ginkgolides, which are believed to improve blood flow and reduce inflammation, leading to enhanced erectile function.
Barks: They contain flavonoids and terpenoids that may help improve blood flow and reduce oxidative stress, contributing to the alleviation of erectile dysfunction symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Grind 500 grams of dried ginkgo biloba leaves in a coffee grinder for 2 minutes to ensure fine powder.
Mix the ground powder with 500 grams of gelatin powder in a large bowl to create a uniform blend.
Add 10 grams of vitamin e oil to the bowl and stir well to enhance the capsules' shelf life.
Use a gelatin capsule machine to fill the capsules with the blend at a rate of 200 capsules per hour.
Store the finished capsules in an airtight container in a cool dry place to preserve their potency for up to 2 years.

remedies.remedy_desc: Medium grandiflorum capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they contain compounds that increase blood flow to the penis, enhancing erection quality. The herb is known to relax the smooth muscle in penile blood vessels, allowing for increased blood flow and reduced pressure. Additionally, medium grandiflorum has been found to stimulate the release of nitric oxide, a natural vasodilator that helps to improve blood flow to the penis, leading to improved erectile function and increased satisfaction.
remedy_constituents: Triterpenes: These compounds have vasodilatory properties, helping to relax blood vessels and improve blood flow to the genitals, thereby aiding in erectile function.
Saponins: Saponins have anti-inflammatory properties, reducing oxidative stress and promoting healthy blood vessel function, which can contribute to improved erectile function.
Alkaloids: Alkaloids in Muirapuama may have a direct impact on the nervous system, enhancing neurotransmitter activity and potentially improving sexual function and desire.
remedy_parts: Roots: Used due to their high concentration of podophyllotoxin, a lignan that may have therapeutic effects on erectile dysfunction.
Leaves: Used because they contain podophyllotoxin and other lignans with potential benefits for treating erectile dysfunction.
remedy_recipe: Gather 500 grams of medium grandiflorum flowers and 100 grams of gelatin capsules size 0.
Dry the flowers in a low-temperature oven at 40 degrees celsius for 24 hours.
Grind 250 grams of the dried flowers into a fine powder using a mill.
Mix 100 grams of the powder with 100 grams of cornstarch and 50 grams of water to form a paste.
Fill the gelatin capsules with the paste using a capsule filling machine.

remedies.remedy_desc: Eurycoma longifolia capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they contain the herb Tongkat Ali, which is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine to enhance male fertility and libido. The capsules are believed to increase testosterone levels, improve blood flow to the genitals, and boost overall energy and vitality. Studies have shown that Tongkat Ali may help alleviate erectile dysfunction by addressing its underlying causes, such as low libido and decreased testosterone levels, allowing individuals to regain their natural ability to achieve and maintain an erection.
remedy_constituents: Glycosides: These compounds help improve erectile function by increasing testosterone levels and enhancing overall male reproductive health.
Alkaloids: Alkaloids found in Eurycoma longifolia have been shown to improve erectile function by increasing blood flow to the penis and reducing oxidative stress.
Flavonoids: Flavonoids in Eurycoma longifolia have antioxidant properties that help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to erectile dysfunction.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are the primary part used due to their high concentration of bioactive compounds, particularly eurycomanone and eurycomanol, which contribute to their medicinal properties.
Seeds: The seeds are used for their rich source of eurycomanone and other alkaloids, which are believed to enhance sexual performance and reduce oxidative stress.
Stems: Some extracts from the stems are used, although less commonly than roots and seeds, due to their potential role in enhancing testosterone levels and reducing stress.
remedy_recipe: Harvest eurycoma longifolia roots and leaves from mature plants with a diameter of at least 10 cm in 3-4 years old forests.
Dry the harvested roots and leaves in a well-ventilated area at 40°c for 3-5 days to maintain their potency.
Grind 500 grams of dried roots and 200 grams of dried leaves into a fine powder using a mill or blender for 5 minutes.
Mix the powder with 100 grams of gelatin capsules and fill them using a capsule filling machine at a rate of 250 capsules per hour.
Label the capsules with the recommended dosage of 2-3 capsules per day and store them in a cool dry place for up to 2 years.

remedies.remedy_desc: Withania somnifera capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they contain a high concentration of Withanolides, which have been shown to improve testosterone levels and enhance libido. The capsules also contain antioxidants that help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, which can contribute to erectile dysfunction. Additionally, Withania somnifera has been traditionally used to improve mental clarity, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost overall energy levels, all of which can help to alleviate symptoms of erectile dysfunction. This makes it a natural and holistic solution to this common issue.
remedy_constituents: Withanolides: These bioactive compounds help improve erectile function by enhancing nitric oxide production, which relaxes smooth muscle and increases blood flow to the penis.
Withaferin A: This alkaloid compound has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the penis, leading to improved erectile function.
Withanoside IV: This glycoside compound has been shown to increase testosterone levels and improve sperm quality, which can contribute to improved erectile function and fertility.
remedy_parts: Roots: The most commonly used part of Withania somnifera for erectile dysfunction capsules, as it contains the highest concentration of bioactive compounds.
Seeds: The seeds are also used to make capsules for erectile dysfunction due to their high antioxidant content and ability to enhance libido.
Barks: The barks of the plant are sometimes used in combination with other parts to enhance the effects of Withania somnifera on erectile dysfunction due to their potential vasodilatory properties.
remedy_recipe: Harvest withania somnifera roots and leaves in the early morning after 2-3 years of cultivation.
Clean the harvested roots and leaves by washing them in distilled water for 10 minutes.
Dry the roots and leaves using a food dehydrator at 50-60 degrees celsius for 6 hours.
Grind 1 part of dried roots and 1 part of dried leaves into a fine powder using a grinder.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 250-500 mg of the powder and seal them using a capsule filler.

remedies.remedy_desc: Avena sativa capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they contain the herbal extract of oats, which is traditionally used to support male fertility and enhance libido. The active compounds in Avena sativa, such as avenacoside and avenanthramides, are believed to help improve blood flow to the penis, increasing erectile function and reducing symptoms of ED. Additionally, Avena sativa is thought to have a balancing effect on the body's hormone levels, which can contribute to improved sexual function and overall well-being.
remedy_constituents: Avenacosides: These compounds have been shown to have a relaxing effect on blood vessels, which can improve blood flow to the penis and help alleviate erectile dysfunction symptoms.
Lignans: Lignans, particularly those with antioxidant properties, can help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation in the penile tissues, promoting healthy blood flow and erectile function.

Phenylethanoid glycosides: These compounds have been found to have vasodilatory properties, which can help increase blood flow to the penis and improve erectile function by relaxing blood vessels and reducing blood pressure.
remedy_parts: Seeds: Used due to their high content of avenanthramides and other bioactive compounds that may help improve erectile function.
Stems: Utilized for their rich source of avenacosides, which may help in increasing blood flow and improving overall sexual health.
Leaves: Employed for their antioxidant properties and potential to reduce inflammation, which can contribute to improved erectile function.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of avena sativa roots and leaves from a pesticide-free field.
Dry the harvested avena sativa in a low-temperature oven at 50°c for 2 hours.
Grind the dried avena sativa into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix 5g of the avena sativa powder with 5g of a natural capsule filler.
Fill 100 empty gelatin capsules with the powder mixture using a capsule filler machine.

remedies.remedy_desc: Lepidium meyenii capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they contain a natural compound called maca, which is believed to enhance libido and improve overall sexual function. Maca is thought to increase nitric oxide production in the body, leading to better blood flow to the penis and improved erections. Additionally, Lepidium meyenii capsules may help to balance hormonal imbalances, particularly those related to testosterone, which is essential for a healthy sex drive and erectile function. This natural remedy has been used for centuries to support male fertility and sexual health.
remedy_constituents: Furostanol saponins: These compounds are believed to improve erectile function by increasing the levels of nitric oxide in the body, which helps to relax the smooth muscles in the penis and improve blood flow.

Steroidal alkylglycosides: These compounds have been shown to increase testosterone levels and improve sperm quality, which can help to address the underlying hormonal imbalances that contribute to erectile dysfunction.
Phytosterols: These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties and can help to improve blood flow to the penis, which can help to alleviate erectile dysfunction symptoms.
remedy_parts: Seeds: Lepidium meyenii seeds are used due to their high concentration of maca alkaloids, which are believed to improve fertility and libido.
Roots: Lepidium meyenii roots are used because they contain a rich source of bioactive compounds, including glucosinolates, that may help alleviate symptoms of erectile dysfunction.
Leaves: Lepidium meyenii leaves are used due to their reported antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in overall health and well-being.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20 grams of lepidium meyenii roots in late afternoon to early evening when the plant is at its peak potency.
Dry the harvested roots in a single layer at 40°c for 24 hours using a food dehydrator.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a high-speed grinder at 10,000 rpm for 5 minutes.
Mix 1 part of the powder with 2 parts of cellulose powder to create the capsule filling.
Fill 50 empty gelatin capsules with 0.5 grams of the powder mixture each and seal them tightly.

remedies.remedy_desc: Epimedium sagittatum capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they contain a wealth of bioactive compounds, including icariin. This potent compound has been shown to increase nitric oxide production in the body, leading to improved blood flow to the penis. As a result, men experiencing erectile dysfunction may find it easier to achieve and maintain an erection. Furthermore, icariin's ability to relax the smooth muscle in blood vessels may also play a role in enhancing erectile function. Its natural and plant-based properties make it an attractive option for those seeking a holistic solution.
remedy_constituents: Icariin: It helps improve blood flow to the penis by relaxing smooth muscle and increasing nitric oxide production, which is essential for maintaining an erection.
Epimedin B: It has vasodilatory properties, which help widen blood vessels and improve blood flow to the penis, contributing to improved erectile function.

Paeoniflorin: It has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the penis, contributing to improved erectile function and overall vascular health.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are rich in Icariin, a flavonoid that helps to relax smooth muscles and improve blood flow to the penis.
Flowers: They contain Icariin and other bioactive compounds that can help to improve erectile function by increasing blood flow and relaxing penile muscles.
Roots: They are a source of Icariin, a key compound responsible for Epimedium's aphrodisiac and vasodilatory effects.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of fresh epimedium sagittatum leaves and stems during the early summer season.
Dry the harvested material in a warm place for 24 hours to remove excess moisture.
Grind 50 grams of dried epimedium sagittatum into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix 250 milliliters of glycerin with 500 milliliters of distilled water and add 10 grams of the powder.
Fill 60 empty gelatin capsules with 200 milligrams of the prepared powder mixture each and seal.

remedies.remedy_desc: Curcuma longa capsules helps with erectile dysfunction because they contain curcumin, a bioactive compound with potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Curcumin has been shown to improve blood flow and reduce oxidative stress in the penile tissue, thereby enhancing erectile function. Additionally, curcumin may help to relax smooth muscle cells in the penile arteries, promoting vasodilation and increased blood flow to the genital area. This can lead to improved erectile function and increased sexual satisfaction.
remedy_constituents: Curcumin: Helps with erectile dysfunction by improving blood flow and reducing inflammation in the blood vessels, which can improve erectile function.
Demethoxycurcumin: May help with erectile dysfunction by inhibiting the production of free radicals and reducing oxidative stress, which can improve blood flow and erectile function.
Cucurbitacin E: May help with erectile dysfunction by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines and reducing inflammation in the blood vessels, which can improve erectile function.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are used because they contain a combination of curcuminoids and other bioactive compounds that may help to improve erectile function.
remedy_recipe: Harvest curcuma longa tubers when the tops begin to yellow and dry completely taking about 6 months to mature.
Clean and peel the harvested tubers and then dry them in a warm dry place for 2-3 weeks.
Grind the dried curcuma longa tubers into a fine powder using a spice grinder or coffee grinder for 5 minutes.
Mix the powder with a binding agent such as gelatin or gum arabic in a ratio of 1:1 and fill into empty gelatin capsules with a capsule filler machine.
Store the herbal curcuma longa capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 years.
